import io
import string

data Node
  token: String
  mut count: Int
  mut next: Option<Node>
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn add_token(_ head: Option<Node>, _ tok: String) -> Option<Node>
  match head
  when None
    Some(Node(token: tok, count: 1, next: None))
  when Some(first)
    mut cur = first
    mut done = false
    while not done
      if cur.token == tok
        cur.count = cur.count + 1
        done = true
      else
        match cur.next
        when Some(n)
          cur = n
        when None
          cur.next = Some(Node(token: tok, count: 1, next: None))
          done = true
        end
      end
    end
    head
  end
end

fn find_top(_ head: Option<Node>) -> Option<Node>
  match head
  when None
    None
  when Some(first)
    mut best = first
    mut cur = first
    mut done = false
    while not done
      if cur.count > best.count
        best = cur
      end
      match cur.next
      when Some(n)
        cur = n
      when None
        done = true
      end
    end
    Some(best)
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut head: Option<Node> = None
mut tok = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if string.len(tok) > 0
        head = add_token(head, tok)
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(tok) > 0
  head = add_token(head, tok)
end

match find_top(head)
when Some(node)
  print("top=#{node.token}=#{node.count}")
when None
  ()
end
